Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-5359" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (16 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Opplev Hamsuns litteratur</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Barndomshjemmet i Hamsund</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4>LANGT FRA MAKTA</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3097" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (30 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h3> </h3></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>1. etasje Kafé Sult, butikk og kunst</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6705" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="facebook" class="w_icon w_icon_facebook social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.facebook.com/Hamsunsenteret/" target="_blank</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-5291" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3694" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Ny utstilling: Den kontroversielle Hamsun</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/kontroversielle-Hamsun</div> <div>Avvik: 61 | Bestått: 83</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (31 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3507" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Velkommen til Marie-dagen 1. juni</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3739</div> <div>Avvik: 53 | Bestått: 69</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (22 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-2956" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Reiser i 60 timer for å delta på åpningen av "Den Kontroversielle Hamsun"</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/ReinardHennig</div> <div>Avvik: 55 | Bestått: 79</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4>SLÅMASKIN OG GULLRING</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7598" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Hamsundagene 2024, takk og farvel.</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3530</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 77</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-5415" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Om oss</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/om-oss</div> <div>Avvik: 58 | Bestått: 75</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Om oss</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9405" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7688" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>TÅRNET FÅR NY KLEDNING</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=11186</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 75</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6289" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Nye utstillinger er åpnet</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3675</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 77</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-5620" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Skrivekurs på en ny måte</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/skrivekurs</div> <div>Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 72</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (25 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="" data-v-65c55a6e="" href="https://seria.no" target="_blank"><span data-v-65c55a6e="">WIPS CMS fra Seria</span></a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-858" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Fortsatt kongelig beskyttelse av Hamsundagene på Hamarøy</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=11469</div> <div>Avvik: 55 | Bestått: 74</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7052" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>The Hamsun Centre</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/en/home</div> <div>Avvik: 60 | Bestått: 84</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Welcome to the Hamsun Centre</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4257" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7310" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Kafé Sult</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/kafesult</div> <div>Avvik: 63 | Bestått: 83</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1156" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4250" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (16 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Opplev Hamsuns litteratur</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Barndomshjemmet i Hamsund</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3297" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Hva var Knut Hamsuns forhold til hjemmet i Hamsund?</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=11113</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 77</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7656" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>Buorre beaivi, God dag!</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-890" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Utstillingene etasje for etasje</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/velkommen/utstillingen-og-kunst</div> <div>Avvik: 66 | Bestått: 101</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (29 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h3> </h3></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>1. etasje Kafé Sult, butikk og kunst</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4185" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="facebook" class="w_icon w_icon_facebook social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.facebook.com/Hamsunsenteret/" target="_blank</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="twitter" class="w_icon w_icon_twitter social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://twitter.com/Hamsunsenteret" target="_blank">k</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="instagram" class="w_icon w_icon_instagram social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.instagram.com/hamsunsenteret/" target="_bl</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4><span style="font-size: 100%; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Program </span></h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3519" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8131" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Besøk oss</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/besok-oss</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 79</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (21 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (29 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-5593" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Knut Hamsuns barndomshjem</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/om-hamsunsenteret/barndomshjemmet</div> <div>Avvik: 46 | Bestått: 64</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (18 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar -
