Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4769" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Knut Hamsun</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/knut-hamsun</div> <div>Avvik: 47 | Bestått: 64</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (18 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9466" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Element has empty aria-label</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="" data-target-set="1" data-v-3e0b142e="" href="/no/knut-hamsun/knuthamsun" target=""><img alt="" class="responsive-image media" data-v-3e0b142e="" data-v-480e55f0="" height="NaN" src="/</div> <div class="fix">Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Mysterier bak Hamsunsenteret</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3830</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 77</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7369" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Åpningstider</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/?id=648384</div> <div>Avvik: 59 | Bestått: 82</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Besøk oss</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3574" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Nå høster vi frukter og bygger bruer</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3697</div> <div>Avvik: 51 | Bestått: 79</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (21 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6659" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>GODT NYTT ÅR ØNSKES FRA HAMSUNSENTERET</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3163</div> <div>Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 71</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (25 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9520" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Bruk høstferien på Hamsunsenteret!</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3564</div> <div>Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 75</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (25 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8475" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Personvernerklæring</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/Personvern</div> <div>Avvik: 73 | Bestått: 97</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>1. Innledende bestemmelser</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1555" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (33 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-728" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Arkitekturen</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/arkitekturen</div> <div>Avvik: 62 | Bestått: 80</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (23 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (29 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8529" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: '1685787217' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="1685787217"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (7 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Arkitekturen</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank">@nordlandsmuseet.no</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="" data-v-65c55a6e="" href="https://seria.no" target="_blank"><span data-v-65c55a6e="">WIPS CMS fra Seria</span></a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8409" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Vi søker engasjerte sommerverter - utløpt</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3632</div> <div>Avvik: 62 | Bestått: 77</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9647" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3060" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1942" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Ednama Sjatto reiser til Slovakia</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3664</div> <div>Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 71</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (25 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text</p> <div class="element"><img alt="" class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-41c669c4="" data-v-ba39de9a="" height="1365" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2025/03/bw9a0315-enhanced-nr.jpg</div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive alt text to the image</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-114" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Boksamtale med tre forfattere</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside/?Article=3840</div> <div>Avvik: 54 | Bestått: 79</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-7798" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>hamsunseminaret-21.jpg (1500×1000)</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2024/03/hamsunseminaret-21.jpg?thumbnail=1920x2000</div> <div>Avvik: 5 | Bestått: 2</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (23 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1409" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Ansatte</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/om-oss/ansatte</div> <div>Avvik: 45 | Bestått: 71</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (18 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text</p> <div class="element"><img alt="" class="responsive-image media" data-v-3e0b142e="" data-v-480e55f0="" height="1360" sizes="(min-width: 1500px) 20vw,(min-width: 1200px) 25vw,(min-width: 900px) 33vw,(min-width: 700px) 50vw,</div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive alt text to the image</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-874" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>monica_celius_foto_bt_stokke_11.jpg (1791×1433)</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2025/09/monica_celius_foto_bt_stokke_11.jpg?thumbnail=1920x2000</div> <div>Avvik: 5 | Bestått: 2</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img height="720" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2025/09/monica_celius_foto_bt_stokke_11.jpg?thumbnail=1920x2000" style="display: block;-webkit-user-select: none;margin</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no headings</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add heading structure to organize page content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8085" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3306" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3030" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Skip to main content</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Café Sult</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/en/home/?Article=29</div> <div>Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 74</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8515" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (23 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Introductory provisions</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3282" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (25 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1433" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Welcome to the Hamsun Centre</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9111" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Welcome to the Hamsun Centre</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Skip to main content</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4847" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Knut Hamsun</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1343" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>By car</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-8274" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (24 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-5930" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'WIPSMAINCONTENTS' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="WIPSMAINCONTENTS"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h3, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h3 data-v-5757855e="">You are here:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Your visit</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h3 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Winter, spring and autumn</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-3732" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (69 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar -
