Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4938" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (7 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Role 'heading' requires aria-level attribute</p> <div class="element"><h2 data-v-db978f5c="" role="heading" tabindex="0">Ny utstilling «Den kontroversielle Hamsun»</h2></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-level attribute to element with role='heading'</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (36 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="" data-v-65c55a6e="" href="https://seria.no" target="_blank"><span data-v-65c55a6e="">WIPS CMS fra Seria</span></a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9678" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>ida_larmo.jpeg (1000×563)</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2024/05/ida_larmo.jpeg?thumbnail=1920x2000</div> <div>Avvik: 5 | Bestått: 2</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2024/05/ida_larmo.jpeg?thumbnail=1920x2000" style="display: block;-webkit-user-select: none;margin: auto;background-color: hsl(0, 0%</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no headings</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add heading structure to organize page content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.1.1 Språk på siden (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(3.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Page is missing language declaration</p> <div class="element"><html style="height: 100%;"><head><meta content="width=device-width, minimum-scale=0.1" name="viewpo</div> <div class="fix">Add lang attribute to <html> element (e.g., lang='nb' for Norwegian Bokmål)</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>earlybird_1_.png (940×788)</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2025/11/earlybird_1_.png?thumbnail=1920x2000</div> <div>Avvik: 5 | Bestått: 2</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h3> </h3></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h3> </h3></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Besøk oss</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1737" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Berømt og fordømt</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/Skolebesok</div> <div>Avvik: 61 | Bestått: 74</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6609" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'menu-item-624' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="menu-item-624"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Møter og konferanser</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/Kurs-og-konferanse</div> <div>Avvik: 68 | Bestått: 83</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (30 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="brochure-title" data-v-ba39de9a="" data-v-c757d330="">Se vår produktkatalog her:</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6006" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (30 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-1813" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Besøk oss på Hamarøy</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/besok-oss/?Article=39</div> <div>Avvik: 56 | Bestått: 80</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (25 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src='data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 333" />' style="--038ecb2a: contai</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Besøk oss</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-9657" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (26 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="facebook" class="w_icon w_icon_facebook social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.facebook.com/Hamsunsenteret/" target="_blank</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5><strong>Oppeid</strong></h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4020" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (33 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-805" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="facebook" class="w_icon w_icon_facebook social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.facebook.com/Hamsunsenteret/" target="_blank</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6107" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Butikk | Makalaus AS</h3> <div class="page-url">https://www.makalaus.online/shop</div> <div>Avvik: 74 | Bestått: 125</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (11 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 aria-hidden="false" class="s__0_gTIQ oBpKa_u---typography-11-runningText oBpKa_u---priority-7-primary ptBG4I" data-hook="filters-title">Filtrer etter</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['div']</p> <div class="element"><ul class="WWubTY" data-hook="filters-list"><div style="display:var(--galleryShowFilters-display, inherit)"><li class="m0XF0t" data-hook="filter-type-COLLECTION"><button aria-expanded="true" class="mb</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a class="piclkP" data-testid="linkElement" href="https://kalender.nordlandsmuseet.no/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><div class="ktxcLB"><div class=""><p class="JghqhY" id="comp-km6cbt1a3</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link has no accessible name (empty link)</p> <div class="element"><a data-hook="product-list-pagination-link-seo-link" href="https://www.makalaus.online/shop?page=2"></a></div> <div class="fix">Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Ledige stillinger" class="StylableButton2545352419__root style-lraodrsg__root wixui-button StylableButton2545352419__link" data-testid="linkElement" href="https://nordlandsmuseet.no/Led</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input aria-invalid="false" autocomplete="off" class="KvoMHf has-custom-focus wixui-text-input__input" id="input_comp-koile710" maxlength="250" name="email" pattern="^.+@.+\.[a-zA-Z]{2,63}$" placehold</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><input aria-hidden="true" class="shCc15" tabindex="-1" type="submit" value="Søk..."/></div> <div class="fix">Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-4447" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Veien til oss</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/besok-oss/reisen-hit</div> <div>Avvik: 78 | Bestått: 101</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (27 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Image is missing alt attribute</p> <div class="element"><img class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-68abd327="" height="333" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/hireslogo.png?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&v%5B%5D=e%3Dx1000" srcse</div> <div class="fix">Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1b</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text</p> <div class="element"><img alt="" class="dynamic-image" data-v-41054d26="" data-v-41c669c4="" data-v-ba39de9a="" height="906" src="https://hamsunsenteret.no/sites/h/hamsunsenteret.no/files/2706521126.jpg?v%5B%5D=e%3Dx200&a</div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive alt text to the image</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="block-title" data-v-7ff3c8e8="">Besøk oss</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-576" cla</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (46 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="facebook" class="w_icon w_icon_facebook social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.facebook.com/Hamsunsenteret/" target="_blank</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="twitter" class="w_icon w_icon_twitter social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://twitter.com/Hamsunsenteret" target="_blank">k</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="instagram" class="w_icon w_icon_instagram social-icon" data-mnu="" data-target-set="1" data-v-2febf5e3="" data-v-d3531bfe="" href="https://www.instagram.com/hamsunsenteret/" target="_bl</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Barndomshjemmet i Hamsund</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/om-hamsunsenteret/barndomshjemmet/Knut-Hamsuns-barndomshjem</div> <div>Avvik: 63 | Bestått: 79</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h1 style="text-align: center;"><a data-target-set="1" href="mailto:hamsunsenteret.booking@nordlandsmuseet.no" target="_blank"><strong></strong></a></h1></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (28 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="language-selector" data-mnu="" data-selector-style="rounded" data-toggle="" data-toggle-name="languageToggle" data-v-1682318f="" data-v-6068d2c2=""><a aria-controls="language-menu-6095" cl</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='article' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div class="w_carousel_column" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data-v-7089008c="" role="article"><img alt="Slideshow image with no description" class="dynamic-image w_carousel_image w_crop" data-v-0eb9fc4d="" data</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><div aria-modal="true" class="contextmenu-backdrop" data-v-3c5f925c="" role="dialog" style="display: none;"></div></div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a data-target-set="1" data-v-7e16d504="" href="#mainContent" role="button">Gå til hovedinnhold</a></div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-hidden="true" class="next-previous-slide w_carousel_arrow_prev" data-mode="previous" data-target-set="1" data-v-0db0e8c2="" data-v-0eee51f0="" href="#" role="button" style="display: none;" tab</div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-hidden="true" class="next-previous-slide w_carousel_arrow_next" data-mode="next" data-target-set="1" data-v-0db0e8c2="" data-v-0eee51f0="" href="#" role="button" style="display: none;" tabinde</div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Hva var Knut Hamsuns forhold til hjemmet i Hamsund?</h3> <div class="page-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/no/om-hamsunsenteret/barndomshjemmet/?Article=11113</div> <div>Avvik: 3 | Bestått: 3</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="footer"> <p>Testreglene er basert på <a href="https://www.uutilsynet.no/regelverk/oversikt-over-testregler-nettsteder/709" target="_blank">UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler</a></p> </div> <div class="modal-overlay" id="rescanModal"> <div class="modal"> <h3>🔄 Start ny skanning</h3> <div class="modal-url">https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside</div> <div class="modal-pages"> <label>Antall sider:</label> <input type="number" id="maxPages" value="120" min="1" max="500" onchange="updateCommand()"> <span class="modal-pages-hint">1-500</span> </div> <p style="font-size:13px;color:#666;margin:0 0 8px">Kopier kommandoen:</p> <div class="modal-command" id="rescanCommand">python checker.py https://hamsunsenteret.no/forside --max-pages 120 --format html</div> <div class="modal-actions"> <button class="modal-btn secondary" onclick="closeRescanModal()">Lukk</button> <button class="modal-btn primary" onclick="copyCommand()">📋 Kopier</button> </div> </div> </div> </body> </html>
